title: Tracking Is Intimacy with My Money
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing dread around money management
excerpt: A short energy statement practice for when checking accounts feels like a chore to avoid. The release clears the heaviness around money admin; the allow opens to a relationship with money where looking is an act of care rather than anxiety.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 51 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use before opening your banking app or sitting down with your accounts.

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for before you look at your money. The release names the dread that builds around account reviews; the allow reframes tracking as staying close to something you're building.
I am ready to release all dread, avoidance, and discomfort around looking at my money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow a warm, steady relationship with my money where tracking feels like care, not checking up. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). This statement is adapted for Day 51 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
